problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.
